seo.title: GPFS Plumbing & Fire Supply | Premier Plumbers in Dallas, TX | (469) 771-1800
seo.description: GPFS Plumbing & Fire Supply offers expert plumbing and fire protection services in Dallas, TX. From residential repairs to commercial fire systems, trust our licensed team. Call (469) 771-1800 for 24/7 service.

hero.eyebrow: Dallas's Premier Plumbing & Fire Protection Company
hero.headline: Reliable Plumbing, Fire Safety & Peace of Mind
hero.subheadline: Licensed, bonded, and insured plumbers serving Dallas with 24/7 emergency service, upfront pricing, and workmanship guaranteed.

featureSections.title: Complete Home Plumbing Solutions
featureSections.body: From leaky faucets to full repipes, our Dallas plumbers handle it all with precision and care. We use the latest technology to diagnose issues quickly and fix them right the first time.
featureSections.cardBody: Most repairs completed the same day you call. No unnecessary delays.

featureSections.title: Commercial & Residential Fire Safety
featureSections.body: We design, install, and maintain fire sprinkler systems, fire pumps, and backflow preventers to keep your property safe and code-compliant. Trust GPFS for all your fire protection needs.
featureSections.cardBody: Certified technicians with decades of fire protection experience.

whyChooseUs.title: Licensed & Insured
whyChooseUs.description: Fully licensed, bonded, and insured for your peace of mind. We meet all Texas state requirements.

whyChooseUs.title: Upfront Pricing
whyChooseUs.description: No hidden fees. You'll know the cost before we start any work.

whyChooseUs.title: Same-Day Service
whyChooseUs.description: Most calls are answered the same day. We respect your time.

whyChooseUs.title: Workmanship Guarantee
whyChooseUs.description: We stand behind our work. If it's not right, we make it right.

testimonials.quote: GPFS saved our Thanksgiving! Our kitchen drain backed up and they came out within an hour. Fast, professional, and reasonably priced.
testimonials.author: Maria G.

testimonials.quote: We needed a full fire sprinkler retrofit for our office building. GPFS handled the design, permits, and installation seamlessly. Highly recommend.

testimonials.quote: I've used GPFS for years. They installed my water heater and fixed a slab leak. Always on time, clean, and friendly.
testimonials.author: Linda R.

cta.headline: Ready to Solve Your Plumbing or Fire Safety Needs?
cta.subheadline: Call (469) 771-1800 now for a free estimate or emergency service.

servicesPage.intro: From minor repairs to major installations, GPFS Plumbing & Fire Supply delivers expert plumbing and fire protection services across Dallas. Our licensed technicians use state-of-the-art equipment and proven techniques to ensure lasting results.

services.title: Residential Plumbing
services.shortDescription: Complete plumbing services for your home, from leak repairs to water heater installation.
services.longDescription: Our residential plumbing team handles everything from dripping faucets to full repipes. We use video camera inspection to pinpoint issues and trenchless technology for minimal disruption. Whether you need a toilet repair, sewer line replacement, or new fixture installation, we deliver quality workmanship with a smile.
benefits: Fast, same-day service for most repairs

process.title: Diagnose
process.description: We thoroughly inspect the issue using advanced tools like camera scopes and leak detectors.

process.title: Propose
process.description: We explain the problem and provide a clear, written estimate before any work begins.

process.title: Repair
process.description: Our skilled plumbers complete the repair efficiently, leaving your home clean and your system working perfectly.

faqs.question: Do you offer emergency plumbing services?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide 24/7 emergency plumbing service. Call (469) 771-1800 anytime for urgent issues like burst pipes or sewer backups.

faqs.question: How much does a plumber cost in Dallas?
faqs.answer: Costs vary by job. We offer free estimates and upfront pricing so you know exactly what you'll pay before we start.

services.title: Commercial Plumbing
services.shortDescription: Reliable plumbing solutions for businesses, restaurants, and multi-family properties.
services.longDescription: GPFS keeps Dallas businesses flowing. We handle commercial plumbing for offices, retail spaces, restaurants, and apartment complexes. Our services include backflow prevention, grease trap maintenance, sewer line repairs, and new construction plumbing. We minimize downtime with after-hours service and proactive maintenance plans.

process.title: Assessment
process.description: We evaluate your property's plumbing system and identify potential issues.

process.title: Plan
process.description: We create a customized solution that fits your schedule and budget.

process.title: Execute
process.description: Our team completes the work efficiently with minimal disruption to your operations.

faqs.question: Do you service restaurants?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We specialize in commercial kitchen plumbing, including grease traps, high-temp water heaters, and floor drains.

faqs.question: Can you handle new construction plumbing?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide rough-in and finish plumbing for commercial new builds and remodels.

services.title: Fire Protection Systems
services.shortDescription: Design, installation, and maintenance of fire sprinklers, pumps, and backflow preventers.
services.longDescription: GPFS is your full-service fire protection partner. We design and install fire sprinkler systems for commercial and residential properties, perform annual inspections, and repair fire pumps and backflow devices. Our licensed technicians ensure your system meets all local and national fire codes.

process.title: Design
process.description: We create a fire protection plan tailored to your building's layout and occupancy.

process.title: Install
process.description: Our team installs sprinklers, pumps, and backflow devices with precision.

process.title: Maintain
process.description: We offer annual inspections, testing, and repairs to keep your system in top shape.

faqs.question: How often do fire sprinklers need inspection?
faqs.answer: NFPA requires annual inspections. We also recommend quarterly visual checks.

faqs.question: Do you install fire pumps?
faqs.answer: Yes, we install and service electric and diesel fire pumps for commercial buildings.

services.title: Water Heater Services
services.shortDescription: Installation, repair, and replacement of tank and tankless water heaters.
services.longDescription: Don't get caught in a cold shower. GPFS installs and repairs all types of water heaters, including traditional tank, tankless, and hybrid models. We help you choose the right size and energy-efficient option for your home or business. Our same-day service means you'll have hot water fast.

process.title: Consult
process.description: We assess your hot water needs and recommend the best system for your budget.

process.title: Install
process.description: Our plumbers install your new water heater safely and efficiently.

process.title: Test
process.description: We test the system and ensure optimal performance before we leave.

faqs.question: How long does a water heater installation take?
faqs.answer: Most installations are completed in one visit, typically 2-4 hours.

faqs.question: Should I choose tank or tankless?
faqs.answer: Tankless heaters save energy and space but have higher upfront cost. We'll help you decide based on your usage and budget.

about.headline: Dallas's Trusted Plumbing & Fire Protection Team
about.mission: To provide Dallas with reliable, honest, and expert plumbing and fire protection services that ensure safety, comfort, and peace of mind.
story: GPFS Plumbing & Fire Supply was founded in 1995 by a team of master plumbers and fire protection specialists who saw a need for a company that could handle both trades with equal expertise. Starting with a single truck, we built a reputation for quality work and honest communication. Over the years, we've grown into one of Dallas's most trusted service providers, serving thousands of homeowners and businesses.

Today, GPFS remains family-owned and operated. We invest in ongoing training, state-of-the-art equipment, and a customer-first approach. Whether it's a leaky faucet or a complex fire suppression system, we treat every job with the same commitment to excellence. Our team lives and works in Dallas, so we care about the community we serve.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We do what we say and stand behind our work.

coreValues.title: Expertise
coreValues.description: Continuous training ensures we stay ahead of industry advances.

coreValues.title: Reliability
coreValues.description: We show up on time and get the job done right.

coreValues.title: Safety
coreValues.description: Every job is performed with the highest safety standards.

contact.headline: Contact GPFS Plumbing & Fire Supply
contact.subheadline: Ready for expert plumbing or fire protection service? Call or fill out the form and we'll get back to you fast.
